case_title: WESTERN UNITED INSURANCE COMPANY VS. JIANG XIAO YU et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT TRANSFERRED FROM ORANGE COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF WESTERN UNITED INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT YU, JIANG XIAO DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-04-2005 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-03-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-20-2005

ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JAN-11-2005 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT YU, JIANG XIAO
BEFORE HEARING, PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, COURT TRIAL SET FOR APR-18-2005 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON FEB-04-2005 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR APR-18-2005 - NO APPEARANCE AT TRIAL CALL. CASE IS DISMISSED. JUDGE ROBERT L. DONDERO; CLERKS: V. MU/D. LOK; REPORTER: JOANN BRYCE, #3321 (206)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
